prior_to_funding_conditions: PTF App Doc Expiration - AUS/Credit Expires: 6/11 Prelim Expires: Appraisal Expires:
PTF CD: Refinance - CD to reflect the following payoff(s) at close: WILMINGTON SAVINGS $322294.48 MAX FUNDS FROM BORROWER (IF ANY):$0.00 PAYOFF EXPIRES: 5/27
PTF DSCR Exhibit 1 - PROVIDE SIGNED AND NOTARIZED BUSINESS PURPOSE & OCCUPANCY AFFIDAVIT

PTF Funding DSCR - PPP Rider - FUNDING TO CLEAR: Closing and funding to confirm within ENC (or with secondary) if a Prepayment Penalty applies and, if so, to ensure the Mortgage/DOT has the applicable rider.
PTF MERS - Closing dept. to clear MERS on all borrowers

UTR PTF: Gov LDP/GSA - UPDATED 4/29 LDP PROVIDED IS NOT COMPLETE (MISSING SEVERAL PARTIES SUCH AS, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, APPRAISER ETC) *** ORIGINAL COND: LDP/GSA for all parites involved with loan including all borrower(s) AKAS
UTR PTF: Property Insurance - HOI Correction - Correct HOI to reflect: update dec page to correct 'usage' is for primary - should reflect rental
prior_to_docs_conditions: 1. App DSCR 1003 REO Updates - Update 1003 to reflect ALL properties owned, including properties held in LLCs. NOTE THAT THEY ONLY NEED TO BE LISTED. DO NOT INCLUDE ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION.
2. App DSCR Calculator - Processor to include DSCR income calculator

3. App DSCR Lock Details - Processor/Branch to have Lock details updated/approved by SECONDARY based on approval terms and, FINAL DSCR, PRIOR TO CTC. Upload and attach said confirmation to this condition. Per Secondary Department: No Exceptions.

4. App PROGRAM - UPDATED 4/29 SG INVESTOR CONNECT *** ORIGINAL: This file has been approved following: MAXEX: DSCR 2 30 Yr Fixed NOO c/o refi // STR // 75% LTV ***note - no DSCR calc provided at intl submission. DSCR ratio has not been calculated by uw at intl approval***
5. App PROGRAM SG MAX LTV - Property is marked in a declining market - 5% Itv reduction required. Max Itv 65%

6. Credit Short Term Rental Refinance SG - UPDATED TO SG 4/29 STR calculated based on average deposits over 12-month history, including zero deposit months, x 80% Examples: Web based Airbnb - VRBO - HomeAway - Flip Key (no private property managers).

7. Credit Short Term Rental Refinance SG - UPDATED TO SG 4/29 STR documentation required: 1) 12 month earnings documentation must be most recent month from application date (no more than 45 days). Printout from Air BNB is for 2025 (expired) and VRBO appears to be a spreadsheet (unacceptable) and 2) Short-term rental statements must clearly identify the subject property by address. Property ID # and property description alone is not sufficient
8. Property Appraisal Correction - Update to reflect: UPDATE APPRAIASL TO REFLECT TENANT OCCUPIED AND NOT OWNER OCCUPIED
9. Property Title Supp - to correct: loan amount
10. QC-Prefund Audit Required - Prefund Audit Required - Any Significant or Moderate findings to be resolved PTF.

prior_to_funding_conditions: PTF App Doc Expiration - AUS/Credit Expires: 6/11 Prelim Expires: Appraisal Expires:
PTF CD: Refinance - CD to reflect the following payoff(s) at close: WILMINGTON SAVINGS $__________ MAX FUNDS FROM BORROWER (IF ANY):$0.00 PAYOFF EXPIRES:
PTF DSCR Exhibit 1 - PROVIDE SIGNED AND NOTARIZED BUSINESS PURPOSE & OCCUPANCY AFFIDAVIT
PTF MERS - Closing dept. to clear MERS on all borrowers
prior_to_docs_conditions: App 1003 Declarations - 5A - 1003 indicates borrowers will occupy the subject property. Please update the 1003 and provide a signed LOE confirming this was disclosed in error and the borowers do not occupy said residence.
App Cust ID NONQM/Jumbo - Provide copy of d.l. or picture ID
App DSCR Calculator - Processor to include DSCR income calculator

App DSCR Lock Details - Processor/Branch to have Lock details updated/approved by SECONDARY based on approval terms and, FINAL DSCR, PRIOR TO CTC. Upload and attach said confirmation to this condition. Per Secondary Department: No Exceptions.

App PROGRAM - This file has been approved following: MAXEX: DSCR 2 30 Yr Fixed NOO c/o refi // STR __ // 75% LTV ***note - no DSCR calc provided at intl submission. DSCR ratio has not been calculated by uw at intl approval***

App Transmittal Summary Updates - Processor to provide updated Transmittal Summary reflecting all final validated info AND FINAL appraised value, Loan amount and Property type prior to CTC submission.
Credit C/O LOE DSCR - Signed LOE detailing the purpose and use of the proceeds from the subject transaction. **Note Cash-out is for Business Purposes only**

Credit Fraud Guard DSCR - additional properties - Fraud Guard reflects borrower(s) own another property not disclosed; Provide evidence they no longer own the property or update 1003 in Encompass. PLEASE NOTE: DSCR loans do not require any supporting property docs when the property is owned. Only 1003 needs to be updated. *** 519 FORBES ST
Credit Payoff Mortgage Debt - Current/updated payoff statement is required

Credit Short Term Rental Refinance - Short term rental income can be used for qualifying on refinance transactions when utilizing an on-line service such as Airbnb or VRBO. A minimum 12-month rental history is required, and the monthly gross income is the average monthly rental income for the most recent 12 months based on statements from the on-line service.
Credit Supp 1 - If/As Applicable: Provide EITHER Current mortgage statement(s) OR a credit supplement updating ALL mortgage ratings through the "funding month"
Gov LDP/GSA - LDP/GSA for all parites involved with loan including all borrower(s) AKAS
Property Appraisal Non Owner - Provide PDF appraisal w/COLOR photos meeting ANSI Standards for inspections & declarations to include rent schedule AND SSRS AND Borrower Ack of Receipt of appraisal.
Property Appraisal Review Maxex - Provide required CDA for underwriter review.
Property Insurance -1 - Provide HOI (HO3 or HO5 policy) verifying premium, AWM Loan # & loss payee
Property Insurance DSCR - HOI must include rent loss coverage equal to at least 6 mos PITIA. "Loss of Use" policy must explicitly state "rent loss" and the amount.

Property Insurance RCE - IF dwelling coverage (including replacement cost cov) is <loan amount & <cost to replace new per appraisal. Insurance Provider to provide an Replacement Cost Esitmate Report >>OR<< Dwelling coverage must be increased.
Property Tax Cert - Tax Certificate for subject required
Property Title Prelim - Current prelim/updated prelim required w/24 mo chain of title and, if/as required, a plat map or survey, reflecting AWM as proposed insured with total loan amount indicated
QA 01-Prelim tittle to be reviewed by QA prior to request for closing document.
QA 02 - Upon receipt of appraisal, QA to review exclusionary list(s) for eligibility.
QA 03 - COC with lock and LE re-discloser.
QC - Prefund Audit Required - Prefund Audit Required - Any Significant or Moderate findings to be resolved PTF.
